name: Blueberry Pie
description: Our absolute favorite, blueberry pie made from wild blueberries in a perfectly flaky butter crust.

name: Apple Pie
description: Made with a blend of tart and sweet apples, this apple pie is perfectly spiced with nutmeg, cardamom, and cinnamon

name: Peach Pie
description: A classic peach pie with a crumble top, made with fresh and juicy Georgia peaches

name: Strawberry Lemonade Pie
description: Our spin on a tart strawberry pie! Every bite tastes like you're sipping on a homemade strawberry lemonade.

name: Strawberry Rhubarb Pie
description: The classic sweet-and-tart pairing, baked into a full butter double crust until perfectly set. All strawberries and rhubarb used are fresh when in season.

name: Chocolate Chip Cookies (8 pc)
description: A pack of 8 chewy chocolate chip cookies that have a nice crunchy edge. Each cookie is roughly 3 ounces or more!

name: Chocolate Chip Muffins
description: A pack of 8 bakery-style muffins loaded with chocolate chips and a golden, domed top.

name: Banana Bread
description: A moist, richly spiced loaf made with ripe bananas and chocolate chips. Great on its own or toasted with butter.
